subject: Quick question about invoice copy
body: Hi team, could you send me a PDF copy of invoice INV-3321 from last month? Thanks!
gold_reply: Hi there, absolutely — we can share that. Please confirm the billing email on the account and we’ll send the PDF invoice copy for INV-3321 right away.

subject: Weekly product newsletter
body: Welcome to this week's updates and product announcements. No action needed.

subject: Re: Login still failing after reset
body: I reset my password twice and still cannot log in. Getting 'invalid token'. Please help urgently.
thread_history:
Agent: Please reset password using the link.
Customer: I did, still broken.
gold_reply: Thanks for flagging this and sorry for the trouble. We’re escalating the invalid token issue now. Meanwhile, please share the exact timestamp and browser so we can unblock you faster.

subject: Out of office auto-reply
body: I am out of office until Monday and will respond when I return.

subject: Need refund right now
body: This is unacceptable. Cancel my plan and refund everything immediately or I will post this everywhere.
gold_reply: Thanks for reaching out. I’m sorry this has been frustrating. I’m routing this to a specialist right away to review your cancellation and refund request.

subject: Can you add 3 users to our account?
body: Please add three seats to our workspace from next billing cycle.
gold_reply: Absolutely — we can help with that. Please confirm the user emails and we’ll add three seats starting next billing cycle.

subject: Fwd: Internal update only
body: Team FYI: dashboard rollout moved to Friday.

subject: Potential data breach concern
body: I think someone accessed our shared inbox without authorization. Need immediate help and security guidance.
gold_reply: Thank you for reporting this. I’m escalating this immediately to our security response team for urgent handling.

subject: How do I export ticket history?
body: Could you guide me on exporting last quarter's ticket history to CSV?
gold_reply: Happy to help. You can export ticket history from Reports > Exports. Select last quarter, choose CSV, and start export. If you want, I can share exact step-by-step screenshots.
